summary.key_theme: ADI 憑藉強勁的股息成長潛力與全球製造韌性布局，持續獲得華爾街分析師與 GARP 投資策略的青睞。

bullish.title: Analog Devices Strengthens Global Manufacturing Resilience with New Thailand Facility
bullish.reason: ADI 在泰國開設新先進製造設施，有助於分散供應鏈風險並提升全球產能韌性，對長期營運成長具正面意義。

bullish.title: Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) Fits the 'Growth at a Reasonable Price' Strategy
bullish.reason: 分析指出 ADI 符合 GARP 投資策略，在合理的估值下展現加速成長潛力，吸引價值型投資人關注。

bullish.title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Analog Devices (ADI): Should You Buy?
bullish.reason: 平均經紀商建議 (ABR) 維持在「買入」評級，顯示華爾街對 ADI 的後市表現仍持樂觀態度。

bullish.title: 5 Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Amid Rising Inflation Risk
bullish.reason: 在通膨與利率不確定性環境下，ADI 被視為具備韌性的股息成長股，能吸引尋求穩定收益的資金配置。

bullish.title: Analog Devices Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於同業，反映市場對該公司短期交易動能的認可。

bearish.title: Why Is Analog Devices (ADI) Down 10.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
bearish.reason: 自上季財報發布後股價下跌 10.1 %，顯示市場對財報後的獲利預期或指引存在修正壓力。

bearish.title: Is Analog Devices (ADI) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Strong 1 Year Share Gain?
bearish.reason: 針對過去一年強勁漲幅後的估值合理性提出質疑，暗示短期內可能存在獲利回吐的風險。

neutral.title: Analog Devices Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
neutral.reason: 儘管當日股價下跌，但相對表現仍優於競爭對手，屬於市場波動下的相對強勢表現。

neutral.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Flowserve, Analog Devices, Broadcom, NVIDIA and TIM
neutral.reason: 僅為財經新聞摘要提及，未對 ADI 基本面提供新的實質分析或影響。
